name: HTS_EVENT_PROCESSING_QUEUE
description: Table to store the polled events information to be processed.

columns.Name: EVENT_PROCESSING_QUEUE_ID
columns.Comments: Unique system generated identifier for an event row that is to be processed

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person ID for which event is generated.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment ID for which event is generated.

columns.Name: EVENT_CHANGE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier that maps to the ChangeID in hrc_evt_obj_changes.

columns.Name: PROCESSING_STATUS
columns.Comments: Processing status of this event record.

columns.Name: POLLED_ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: ESS request ID which polled this event record.

columns.Name: PROCESSED_ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: ESS request ID which last processed this event record.

columns.Name: PROCESS_LOGS
columns.Comments: To capture information on processing of events like which work pattern was created, updated, deleted etc.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
